title: CRPT_X Anti-Rotation
description: Prevents block rotation while retaining ore visibility!
body:
# Bases found through block rotation?
_Never worry again with CRPT1X Anti-Rotation!_

This texture pack changes the appearance of rotatable blocks such as deepslate and its ores so that no one can find your base using them, **all while keeping ores recognisable unlike other anti-rotation packs.**

Works with **ALL LAUNCHERS/CLIENTS**, and is compatible with ~~the latest version of Minecraft~~ all versions of Minecraft after 1.18!

Made for servers such as DonutSMP, 2b2t, and 6b6t.

V2 coming soon!
